name: Claim denied by Perplexity - what next?
description: Cease/desist, then sue in federal court.[1]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied by Perplexity - what next?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cease/desist, then sue in federal court.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Send cease/desist with evidence; file suit if ignored—NYT proceeded post-notice.[1] Key factors: response timeline (30 days typical), escalation path.[1] Preserve for spoliation claims. Litigation often prompts settlement.
